name: 📖 Content / curriculum issue

> Curriculum is **manually curated**. Report the specific item so it can be fixed at the source
> (dev admin → `npm run seed:dbs`), not patched ad hoc.

**Type of content issue**
- [ ] Unnatural / wrong sentence (`bank_sentences`)
- [ ] Wrong or Simplified character
- [ ] Undrawable / missing stroke data
- [ ] Zhuyin (注音) error
- [ ] TOCFL word / level issue
- [ ] 台/臺 (or other variant) shown incorrectly
- [ ] Other

**The exact item**
- Character(s) / word / sentence (paste the text):
- Where it appears (module + screen):
